name: trade-signal-research-kit
description: Trade-signal research kit: schema-first market data + HTTP research runtime

scripts.websearch:smoke: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run run:websearch-smoke --
scripts.test:linkage: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run test:linkage
scripts.test:screener: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run test:screener
scripts.reports-site:emit: pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run run:reports-site-emit
scripts.reports-site:clear: pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run run:reports-site-clear
scripts.reports:reset: pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run run:reports-site-clear -- --target app --parts all
scripts.sync:reports-to-app: pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run run:reports-site-sync
scripts.sync:reports-to-docs: pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-runtime run run:reports-site-sync -- --legacy-docs
scripts.dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run app:dev
scripts.start: pnpm run build && pnpm run app:start
